meta.title: Huilauloa | Hui KńĀko Ľo KaińĀulu ma Kailua-Kona
meta.description: He hui kńĀko Ľo kaińĀulu  Ľo Huilauloa ma Kailua-Kona no nńĀ papahana  ĽŇćpio, nńĀ hanana mo Ľomeheu, ka mńĀlama kai, a me ka ho ĽokŇękŇę he Ľe nalu o Honl's.

hero.title: Huilauloa
hero.subtitle: Mo Ľomeheu ¬∑ KaińĀulu ¬∑ Kai
hero.date: NńĀ papahana a puni ka makahiki

about.label: No MńĀkou
about.title: Ke KŇękulu PŇę Nei i KaińĀulu Pa Ľa
about.p1: He hui kńĀko Ľo kaińĀulu  Ľo Huilauloa i ho Ľokumu  Ľia ma Kailua-Kona e kńĀko Ľo i nńĀ  Ľohana, nńĀ  ĽŇćpio, a me ka mo Ľomeheu ma o nńĀ papahana kŇępono.
about.p2: I kńďia manawa, ua ho Ľololi  Ľia kńďia  Ľao Ľao nui no ka hui holo Ľoko Ľa, a  Ľo ka ho ĽokŇękŇę he Ľe nalu o Honl's he  ĽńĀpana ho Ľokahi wale nŇć. E ho Ľoponopono hou  Ľia ka  ĽŇćlelo pahuhopu ma hope.

u12.name: Ma Lalo o 12
u12.description: NńĀ keiki  ĽŇćpio 11 makahiki a ma lalo e hŇć Ľike ana i ke kńĀmua o ka papahe Ľe nalu

u18.name: Ma Lalo o 18
u18.description: MńĀhele  ĽŇćpio no ka po Ľe ho ĽokŇękŇę 12‚Äď17 makahiki

dropknee.name: Kuli Ha Ľaha Ľa
dropknee.description: Po Ľe akamai DK me ka noho kuli ho Ľokahi

standup.name: KŇę Pololei
standup.description: MńĀhele papahe Ľe nalu kŇę pololei

schedule.label: Hanana
schedule.title: Papahana

start.title: Ho Ľomaka ka Ho ĽokŇękŇę
start.sub: NńĀ puni Ma Lalo o 12 & Ma Lalo o 18

schedule.note: Hiki ke ho Ľololi ka papahana ma muli o nńĀ kŇęlana

sponsors.label: NńĀ Hoa
sponsors.title: NńĀ Hoa KńĀko Ľo KaińĀulu
sponsors.subtitle: Hana pŇę mńĀkou me nńĀ hui kŇęloko, nńĀ  Ľoihana, a me nńĀ mea manawale Ľa no ka hopena lŇć Ľihi ma Kona.

become.title: E Hui PŇę me Huilauloa
become.description: KŇćkua i ka mńĀlama mau  Ľana i nńĀ papahana no nńĀ  ĽŇćpio, nńĀ  Ľohana, a me ka mńĀlama kai ma ko mńĀkou kaińĀulu.

cta.title: Makemake e KńĀko Ľo i ka Pahuhopu?
cta.description: E ho Ľopili mai e manawale Ľa, e hui, a e kŇćkua i ka ho Ľonohonoho  Ľana i nńĀ papahana hou a Huilauloa.

register.label: Ho ĽokŇękŇę
register.title: KńĀkau Inoa
register.signInMessage: Pono  Ľoe e komo e kńĀkau inoa.

success.title: Ua KńĀkau Inoa  ĽOe
success.message: E  Ľike ińĀ  Ľoe ma Ke Kahakai o Honl, Iune 14‚Äď15, 2026.
success.view: E NńĀnńĀ i NńĀ KńĀkau Inoa

form.dateOfBirthNote: Pono no nńĀ mńĀhele kaupalena makahiki
form.terms: Ma ke kńĀkau inoa  Ľana,  Ľae  Ľoe he mea pilikia ka he Ľe papahe Ľe nalu. Pono nńĀ mea ho ĽokŇękŇę ma lalo o 18 makahiki e kakau kekahi makua i ka palapala  Ľae ma ka palapala inoa.
form.submit: E Ho Ľopau i ke KńĀkau Inoa

register.viewRegistrations: E nńĀnńĀ i nńĀ kńĀkau inoa

login.title: Aloha Mai
login.subtitle: E komo e ho Ľoponopono i nńĀ kńĀkau inoa
login.invalidCredentials: ĽA Ľole pololei ka leka uila a i  Ľole ka  ĽŇćlelo huna

signup.title: Hana Mo ĽokńĀki
signup.subtitle: E komo i ka ho ĽokŇękŇę
signup.passwordNote: Li Ľili Ľi loa 8 mau huapalapala
signup.confirmPassword: HŇć Ľoia i ka  ĽŇĆlelo Huna

errors.passwordMismatch: ĽA Ľole like nńĀ  ĽŇćlelo huna
errors.passwordLength: Pono ka  ĽŇćlelo huna he 8 mau huapalapala ma ka li Ľili Ľi loa
errors.accountCreated: Ua hana  Ľia ka mo ĽokńĀki. E  Ľolu Ľolu e komo mai.

dashboard.label: Papa Kuhikuhi
dashboard.signInMessage: E komo e nńĀnńĀ i kńĀu papa kuhikuhi.

noRegistrations.title: ĽA Ľohe KńĀkau Inoa
noRegistrations.message: ĽA Ľole i kńĀkau inoa  Ľoe no kekahi mńĀhele.
noRegistrations.button: E KńĀkau Inoa i Kńďia Manawa

eventInfo.title: ĽIke Hanana
eventInfo.checkinValue: 6:30 AM i kńďlńĀ me kńďia lńĀ

standings.label: Ola
standings.title: KŇęlana
standings.subtitle: NńĀ palapala ho ĽokŇękŇę a me nńĀ hopena ma ka mńĀhele

programs.label: KńĀ MńĀkou Hana
programs.title: NńĀ Papahana a me NńĀ Hana Nui
programs.subtitle: Mai ke kńĀko Ľo  ĽŇćpio a i ka mńĀlama kai, kńĀko Ľo  Ľo Huilauloa i nńĀ papahana alaka Ľi kaińĀulu a puni ka makahiki.
programs.exploreContest: E NńĀnńĀ i ka Ho ĽokŇękŇę ‚Üí

community.name: KńĀko Ľo KaińĀulu
community.description: NńĀ hanana kŇęloko, kŇćkua  Ľohana, a me nńĀ papahana hui e ho Ľoikaika i ka pilina ma Kona.

youth.name: Ho Ľomohala  ĽŇĆpio
youth.description: NńĀ ala a Ľo a alaka Ľi e kŇćkua i nńĀ keiki e ulu me ka hilina Ľi, kuleana, a me ka ha Ľaheo.

stewardship.name: MńĀlama Kai
stewardship.description: NńĀ papahana no ka mńĀlama kahakai a me nńĀ wai ma o ka a Ľo, lawelawe, a me ka mńĀlama pŇę.

honlsClassic.name: Ho ĽokŇękŇę He Ľe Nalu o Honl's
honlsClassic.description: He ku Ľuna kaińĀulu ko Ľiko Ľi nŇć ka ho ĽokŇękŇę makahiki, a he  ĽńĀpana ia o ka hana ńĀkea a Huilauloa.

events.label: Alemanaka KaińĀulu
events.title: NńĀ Hana a puni ka Makahiki
events.subtitle: Loli nńĀ papahana i kńďlńĀ me kńďia kau me ka hui pŇę me nńĀ  Ľohana, nńĀ kula, a me nńĀ hoa kaińĀulu.
events.note: E ho Ľohou  Ľia nńĀ lńĀ a me nńĀ kiko Ľńę i ka pau  Ľana o ka ho ĽolńĀlńĀ.

spring.title: NńĀ KŇękńĀkŇękńĀ Ho ĽolńĀlńĀ KaińĀulu
spring.description: NńĀ kŇękńĀkŇękńĀ hńĀmama me nńĀ kama ĽńĀina a me nńĀ hoa no ka ho Ľonohonoho i nńĀ pahuhopu hou.

summer.title: NńĀ Papahana  ĽŇĆpio a me ke Kai
summer.description: NńĀ hana lima a me nńĀ hńĀlńĀwai e kńĀlele ana i ka komo  Ľana o ka  ĽŇćpio a me ka  Ľike kai.

fall.title: NńĀ Hanana Mo Ľomeheu a KaińĀulu
fall.description: NńĀ hanana lehulehu e ho Ľolaule Ľa ana i nńĀ waiwai like a me nńĀ ku Ľuna kŇęloko.

winter.title: Kau Ho ĽokŇękŇę o Honl's
winter.description: Ka ho ĽomńĀkaukau a me ke kńĀko Ľo no ka ho ĽokŇękŇę makahiki ma loko o ka pahuhopu nui o ka hui.
